SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.java

Class JkJavaCompilerToolChain

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.java.JkJavaCompilerToolChain
public final class JkJavaCompilerToolChain extends Object
Compiler for Java source code. Underlying, it uses either a JavaCompiler instance either an external process (forked mode). The compiler selection follows these rules :
    • If a compiler tool is specified then compilation will use it
      If a compiler process is specified then compilation will use it
      If the Java source version is same than running JDK then compilation will use it
      If the Java source version is different than running JDK then compilation will use best fitted compiler among the ones specified in jdkHomes

    • Field Details

      • JAVA_SOURCE_MATCHER

        public static final PathMatcher JAVA_SOURCE_MATCHER
        Filter to consider only Java source

    • Method Details

      • of

        public static JkJavaCompilerToolChain of()
        Creates a JkJavaCompilerToolChain without specifying a JavaCompiler instance or an external process. When nothing is specified, this compiler will try the default JavaCompiler instance provided by the running JDK.

      • setCompileTool

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain setCompileTool(JavaCompiler tool, String... params)
        Sets underlying java compiler tool to use. Since in-process compilers cannot be run in forking process mode, this method disables any previous fork options that may have been set.

      • setJavacProcess

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain setJavacProcess(JkProcess compileProcess)
        Sets the underlying compiler with the specified process. The process is typically a 'javac' command.

      • setJdkHints

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain setJdkHints(JkJavaCompilerToolChain.JkJdks jdks, boolean preferInProcess)
        Sets the JDK hints to specify the available JDKs and whether to prefer in-process tool for compilation.
        Parameters:
        jdks - A JkJavaCompilerToolChain.JkJdks instance defining the JDKs to be considered during compilation.
        preferInProcess - If true, the compiler tool is preferred over process-based compilation; otherwise, the process is preferred.
        Returns:
        The current instance of JkJavaCompilerToolChain with updated JDK hints.

      • setJavaDistrib

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain setJavaDistrib(String distrib)

      • getJavaDistrib

        public String getJavaDistrib()

      • setForkCompiler

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain setForkCompiler(boolean forkCompiler)
        Configures whether the Java compilation process should be forked into an external process.
        Parameters:
        forkCompiler - If true, the compilation process will be forked into an external process. If false, the compilation will occur in-process.
        Returns:
        The current instance of JkJavaCompilerToolChain with the updated fork configuration.

      • isToolOrProcessSpecified

        public boolean isToolOrProcessSpecified()

      • compile

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain.Status compile(JkJavaVersion targetVersion, JkJavaCompileSpec compileSpec)
        Actually compile the source files to the output directory.
        This toolchain will try to find the most suitable JDK for performing compilation.
        Parameters:
        targetVersion - Can be null. Provides the version of JDK to use for javac. If null, it will try to infer JDK version from #compileSpec.
        compileSpec - Contains options to pass to the Java compiler. It includes sources, versions, and other options specified for the compiler.
        Returns:
        false if a compilation error occurred.
        Throws:
        IllegalStateException - if a compilation error occurred and the 'withFailOnError' flag is true.

      • compile

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain.Status compile(JkJavaCompileSpec compileSpec)
        See Also:
        • compile(JkJavaVersion, JkJavaCompileSpec)

      • runAnnotationProcessors

        public JkJavaCompilerToolChain.Status runAnnotationProcessors(JkJavaVersion targetVersion, JkJavaCompileSpec compileSpec)
        Runs annotation processors on the provided Java sources and classpath. No need to specify '-proc:only' as it will be automatically added.

      • isCompilationForked

        public boolean isCompilationForked(JkJavaVersion javaVersion, JkJavaCompileSpec compileSpec)
        Determines if the Java compilation process is forked into an external process.
        Returns:
        true if the compilation process is forked into an external process, false otherwise.
